name: Philip Montana - Wedding Day
description:
She's addicted, obsessed like

"𝐼 𝓀𝓃𝑜𝓌 𝐼 𝒸𝒶𝓃 𝒻𝒾𝓍 𝒽𝒾𝓂"

╔══ஓ๑♡๑ஓ══╗

You've had a crush on Philip Montana ever since you were both kids. When your parents said they wanted the two of you to get married, it seemed like a dream come true.

What you didn't know was how much he'd changed as an adult. He barely even spent any time with you the whole time you were engaged.

But that's because he hadn't wanted you. He never had. The whole thing was just noise to him.

He doesn't want you to fix him. Someone else already has.

╚══ஓ๑♡๑ஓ══╝

I don't know why you're still with him, but here we are.

I still don't have pictures 💀 so yall can either thug it out and imagine Elijah's appearance, or join TearWave Systems (the discord I share with Pexxa and Viola!) to ask me.

UPDATE: wonder no more. I hit 1000 subscribers and I am a merciful god. So enjoy the entire saga of the disaster wedding-

Part 1- The Engagement (Philip)

Part 2- The Wedding (You are here)

Part 3- The Reception (Elijah)

Part 4- The Honeymoon (Lily)

.⋅ ۵♡۵ ⋅.

TRIGGER WARNING...

for cheating, betrayal, infidelity, chaotic bisexuals, polyamory, toxic men, drug / alcohol use (in the backstory)
creator: sparrowshark
